build.beforeDevCommand: cd ../.. && npm run build --workspace=client && cargo build --release -p server && HOST=$(rustc -vV | sed -n 's/^host: //p') && BIN=target/release/server && cp "$BIN" "${BIN}-${HOST}" && npm run dev:vite --workspace=client
build.beforeBuildCommand: cd ../.. && npm run build --workspace=client && cargo build --release -p server && HOST=$(rustc -vV | sed -n 's/^host: //p') && BIN=target/release/server && cp "$BIN" "${BIN}-${HOST}"
